title: Wayback Stone
description: Helping you find your way back home.
body:
The Wayback Stone is a magical item that can help you find your way back home! Simply right click while holding the stone and you will be instantly teleported back to your bed, respawn anchor, or the world spawn point! After use the stone will go on cooldown for 5 seconds.

The stone can be crafted using gold ingots, glowstone blocks from the nether, and a heart of the sea which is found in buried pirate treasure.

![Crafting recipe for the wayback stone.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jnEX3LEk/images/336522962f18e1c436fd75a647936cae9680ab99.png)
